# dt3bza-security.com

> This site provides authoritative information on cybersecurity, CCTV surveillance, school security, and community safety platforms in the Western Cape, South Africa. It includes detailed service descriptions, industry-specific solutions, and the upcoming UNITI community safety platform launching December 2026.

## Core Content

### Cybersecurity Services
- Vulnerability reviews, network hardening, and protection planning
- Delivered remotely across South Africa
- Quoted per engagement after free consultation
- [Learn more](https://dt3bza-security.com/#/cybersecurity)

### CCTV & Surveillance
- Professional camera installation, maintenance, and upgrades
- HD IP cameras, NVR/DVR setup, AI motion detection, LPR
- Free on-site assessment within 50km of Cape Town
- [Learn more](https://dt3bza-security.com/#/cctv)

### School Security
- Perimeter monitoring, entrance visibility, and security planning
- Focused on educational facilities in the Western Cape
- [Learn more](https://dt3bza-security.com/#/schools)

### UNITI — Community Safety Platform
- Launching December 2026 on Android (Google Play)
- Real-time crime map, panic alerts, neighbourhood watch, private security integration
- iOS launch Q1 2027, B2B security dashboard Q2 2027
- [Join the waitlist](https://dt3bza-security.com/#/dt3app)

## Company

- Legal name: DT3BZA Security (Pty) Ltd
- Also trading as: FORTYXIS SECURITY (government and tender identity)
- Founder: Tebogo van Rooyen
- Location: Western Cape, South Africa
- Contact: +27 68 486 1332 | info@dt3bza-security.com
- PSIRA Registered | CIPC Registered | CSD Registered | Level 1 B-BBEE EME | POPIA Compliant

## Industries Served
- Law firms
- Accounting firms
- Schools and educational institutions
- Construction sites
- Warehouses and industrial facilities
- Private security companies

## How to Get a Quote
- Smart quote wizard: under 2 minutes, instant ZAR estimate
- Direct WhatsApp: https://wa.me/27684861332
- Email: info@dt3bza-security.com
- Free on-site assessment within 50km of Cape Town

## Credentials
- No retainer contracts — all services quoted per job
- Free on-site assessments within 50km radius
- Client confidentiality assured on all engagements
- POPIA and ECT Act compliant
